title: Intense Filipino Seitan Stew
description: A savory, silky vegan stew that captures the aromatic depth of Filipino adobo with seitan as the star protein.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and minced garlic and sauté until fragrant and translucent.
Stir in the ground ginger and seitan pieces, cooking for 2 minutes until the seitan is lightly browned.
Pour in the soy sauce, vinegar, coconut milk, and water, then add the bay leaf and whole peppercorns.
Bring the mixture to a boil, reduce the heat, cover, and let it simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the bay leaf and add the calamansi juice, tasting to adjust salt or acidity as needed.
Continue to simmer uncovered for an additional 10 minutes until the sauce thickens to a silky consistency.
Serve the stew hot over steamed rice or with crusty bread, garnishing with sliced scallions if desired.
